today_trades.rationale: OVERBOUGHT REVERSAL (Pattern A, BULL regime). RSI 94.8 — extreme overbought, one of the highest readings seen. BB %B 1.01 = price breaching upper Bollinger Band. MACD hist +0.55 shows momentum still positive but this level of RSI extension is unsustainable intraday. Price $270.51 at session VWAP ($270.69) — acceptable short entry zone. ATR = $1.19, so 2.5x ATR stop ~$3.00 above entry → SL ~$273.50, TP ~$267.50 (reversion to SMA20 $268.19 area). Expected hold: 3-5h through closing hour momentum. Target exit by 3:45 PM ET. CAVEAT: Our AAPL history is 0/3 WR — sizing at lower end (half-size) accordingly.
